sections.description: WordPress-native bookings CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.8.46: Add repair routines to normalize old pricing rows and recalculate booking header totals.
  • 1.8.8.45: Improve Bookings total fallback and split General settings from Invoice Ninja credentials.
  • 1.8.8.44: Add General settings tab and make Bookings totals fall back to summed room totals.
  • 1.8.8.43: Make Bookings page schema-aware for commission data and add Settings repair tools.
  • 1.8.8.42: Fix calendar room-rate fallback for older bookings with empty subtotal values.
  • 1.8.8.41: Make Invoice Ninja use stored CRM commission values first and bump version for testing.
  • 1.8.8.40: Backfill CRM commission values, show stored commission on Booking Detail, and bump version for testing.
  • 1.8.8.39: Store commission in CRM room/night rows, show commission on Bookings list, and bump test version.
  • 1.8.8.38: Show commission preview in booking forms and fix Settings tab routing/titles.
  • 1.8.8.37: Add configurable Booking.com auto-commission, bump version for testing, and keep manual commission as override.
